Video.summary: The story about the 1972 Charger is briefly revisited, and past work leading to its completion is also revisited. Work on the 1972 Dodge Charger is completed and revealed to the owners.
Video.title: Gone Bananas

Video.summary: Matt heads out west to find out what makes the King of the Hammers one of the fastest growing races in the world.
Video.title: King of the Hammers

Video.summary: Bruno Massel takes a trip to Huntington Beach, California to see a garage of Dream Cars that inspired a company.
Video.title: See It Made-Surf City Garage

Video.summary: The Chassis for the Rock Racer is almost done, so Matt and Bruno add a Speedwire System and install the torque converter.
Video.title: Rock Racer

Video.summary: Matt and Bruno replace a small engine on a go kart and get some help from some kids on a special project.
Video.title: Small Engine

Video.summary: Bruno and Matt need to create an ultimate truck for work and play. They get a visit from Clint at ATS Diesel and find out what’s available in the aftermarket for performance.
Video.title: Work and Play #1

Video.summary: Work continues on the Dodge Work and Play Project Truck. Today, we help the ride with a wireless air bag system and add some much needed storage capability.
Video.title: Work and Play#2

Video.summary: Learn why a truck’s steering geometry is such an important issue to address after installing a lift kit on your truck.
Video.title: Steering Geometry

Video.summary: What causes a misfire in your engine? Follow Bruno and Matt as they travel through a diagnostic journey to find an answer to the problem.
Video.title: Fouled up Ford

Video.summary: Matt and Bruno take an enclosed car trailer and turn it into a toy hauler with all the amenities of home.
Video.title: Toy Hauler Build-Up

Video.summary: Matt and Bruno diagnose a “no-start problem” on an ‘05 Chevy Silverado and get some help with the repair from NASCAR Crew Chief Alan Gustafson.
Video.title: Get It Started

Video.summary: Whether they are on the road, or in the garage, Bruno and Matt find answers to technical questions everyday. Today, they will answer some of your viewer questions while working on a new truck.
Video.title: Ask the Hosts

Video.summary: One million miles may sound like a lot – but NOT for a Cummins Diesel engine. Today, we’ll find out what makes these incredible engines built to last.
Video.title: Cummins Diesel-Built to Last

Video.summary: The 1970 Plymouth Superbird work is resumed, and the 1970 Charger R/T collision repair is completed. The 1970 Barracuda Convertible's 383 2bbl. V8 is assembled and painted.
Video.title: Manifold Destiny

Video.summary: A secret is accidentally revealed by Mark. Mark and Daren visit the local AAMCO Transmissions to watch the overhaul of the 1970 Barracuda Convertible's 727 Automatic Transmission, and then the Barracuda has its A/C box and instrument panel installed. The 1970 Superbird assembly nears completion.
Video.title: Spoiler Alert

Video.summary: Automotive parts supplier Tony D'Agostino of Tony's Parts helps the shop get organized, and Mark tests his Mopar knowledge against Tony's. Work on a 1970 Plymouth Superbird is completed.
Video.title: MoSparring

Video.summary: The 1970 Superbird's restoration and story is recapped, and the Hills visit the shop to take delivery of the car, along with its original owner. Mike and Michael Hill drive the Superbird on a cross county trip home to South Carolina.
Video.title: The Hills Have Eyes on a Superbird

Image.alt: The Hills Have Eyes on a Superbird
The Hills Have Eyes on a Superbird
The Hills Have Eyes on a Superbird

Video.summary: With the 1970 Plymouth Superbird done and safely driven home, Mark is asked to restore a 1969 Daytona Charger. Due to its condition, Mark questions if it's practical and if it's even legal.
Video.title: Clipped Wings

Video.summary: Just when things couldn't get more stressful, Mark agrees to finally get the 1930 Chevy Coach fully restored by the end of the week. Meanwhile, Mark QC's the next cars in the process of resurrection.
Video.title: Put Me In, Coach

Video.summary: See the complete 3-year restoration of Kimberly Cook's 1970 Barracuda Convertible: the body, paint, engine, and convertible top, culminating in Graveyard Carz' most emotional reveal to date.
Video.title: How to Cook a Barracuda

Video.summary: New shop. New crew. An All-new Graveyard Carz! The ghouls tackle a 1970 Cuda.
Video.title: Commando Cuda vs. Magnum Force

Video.summary: Mark paints a Hemi Charger in his favorite Mopar color, burnt orange. AMD delivers the Phantom Cuda, and the ghouls finish the Dailey's 1970 Cuda 383, a project four years in the making.
Video.title: Rallye Red Restored

Video.summary: The ghouls wrap up the 340 Cuda and install panels on the Hemi Charger. Mark trains Allysa on O.E.M. assembly line markings. The legendary red Plymouth Fury "Christine" visits the shop.
Video.title: Hell Hath No '58 Fury

Video.summary: Kevin and Bryan install a new exhaust kit on a new Challenger and then start work on Bryan’s 33 getting it ready for a chop.
Video.title: Challenging Exhaust

Video.summary: Bryan finally gets to fulfill his dream of chopping the top on his 33.
Video.title: Under the Knife

Video.summary: Kevin and Bryan begin work on a new Factory Five Hot Rod with a Dart 369 engine build
Video.title: Factory Five Build Part 1 - the Engine

Image.alt: Factory Five Build Part 1 - the Engine
Factory Five Build Part 1 - the Engine
Factory Five Build Part 1 - the Engine

Video.summary: Bryan and Kevin get the body on their Factory Five Hot Rod
Video.title: Factory Five Build Part 2 - the Body

Image.alt: Factory Five Build Part 2 - the Body
Factory Five Build Part 2 - the Body
Factory Five Build Part 2 - the Body

Video.summary: Kevin and Bryan finish their five-day Factory Five project and take their car to the streets.
Video.title: Factory Five Build Part 3 - the Test

Image.alt: Factory Five Build Part 3 - the Test
Factory Five Build Part 3 - the Test
Factory Five Build Part 3 - the Test

Video.summary: Learn some Mig and Tig welding tips as the guys finish the roll cage and do some patch panels on the Fuller Hot Rod Project.
Video.title: Welding Tips

Video.summary: How do you a make a 2010 SS throw back Camaro look even better. Drop it off with Kevin and Bryan and see what happens.
Video.title: Custom Camaro

Video.summary: Kevin installs a new wiring harness while Bryan welds up a new exhaust for our Nova.
Video.title: SuperNova

Video.summary: Kevin visits Magnaflow to see what it takes to get that perfect sounding exhaust.
Video.title: See it Made - Magnaflow

Video.summary: Kevin and Bryan tear up a motor to see the importance of the serpentine belt.
Video.title: FEAD System

Video.summary: Kevin takes us through variable cam timing in Ford’s new 5.0L power plant.
Video.title: 2011 Mustang

Video.summary: Fuller and Byrd bring back the Café Racer Honda bike and show you how to open up the jets in the carburetor for better performance.
Video.title: Café Racer Gets Jets

Video.summary: We look at the technology behind turbochargers and intercoolers as we install some upgrades on a F250 Super Duty.
Video.title: Turbo Technology

Video.summary: Bryan takes a trip to San Antonio to teach some of our nations heroes how to weld.
Video.title: Operation Comfort

Video.summary: We tackle an A/C cooling problem on a Toyota Tacoma and introduce you to Kevin’s Hot Rod BMW.
Video.title: Cold Air, Hot Rod

Video.summary: Kevin and Bryan continue the work on Kevin’s LSM3 project.
Video.title: LSM3
